summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of TattooMatch MVP. 21/21 backend pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend Discover/Moodboard/DNA/Studio/Login/Logout/Like/Save/Follow flows verified via Playwright with screenshots. Turkish localization clean. Zero page errors. One non-blocking issue: duplicate data-testid values cause Playwright strict-mode violations.
action_items: OPTIONAL: De-duplicate data-testid attributes on ArtistProfile (rating-star-{1..5}) and Dashboard/Studio (upload-open-btn, studio-edit-btn). Currently 2 elements share each testid (likely desktop + mobile renders), causing Playwright strict-mode violations. Suggest suffixing with -desktop/-mobile or conditionally rendering only one.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 749 lines — consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/artists.py, routers/tattoos.py, routers/dna.py for maintainability.
Tattoo DNA computes per-artist scoring inside a Python loop with N+1 DB queries (one db.tattoos.find per artist). For larger datasets aggregate via $lookup or cache. OK for MVP.
Image base64 stored in MongoDB (entire data URL) — works at small scale but will bloat the DB. Document this limitation; consider blob storage in future.

CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] AND allow_credentials=True — this combination is rejected by browsers strictly per CORS spec. allow_origin_regex='.*' is acting as the actual allowlist here. Acceptable for preview but tighten in production.
Toggle-style endpoints (/like, /save, /follow) are non-idempotent — frontend must reflect state correctly to avoid double-toggle. Verified working.
Cookie flags samesite='none' + secure=True + httponly=True correctly set for cross-site preview env.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all key flows verified — login, discover interactions, moodboard, DNA, artist profile, studio dashboard, Turkish UI)

test_credentials: demo@user.com / Demo1234! (user); deniz@inkstudio.com / Artist123! (artist). Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data (6 artists + demo user + admin). Tests create TEST_-prefixed users for register/dna scenarios. No cleanup script needed since users carry TEST_ prefix and never collide with prod data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers health, auth (register/login/me/logout, Turkish errors, JWT bearer), artists list/detail, feed (anon+auth), tattoo upload RBAC, like/save toggle + moodboard, follow toggle + follows/me, comments+rating CRUD/upsert, DNA neutral-50 for new users and reflection of liked styles. Run via: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_backend.py -v. Duplicate data-testids on ArtistProfile rating stars (10 instead of 5) and Studio buttons (2 each) — use .first or .nth(0) in Playwright. Frontend uses Bearer token from localStorage + httpOnly cookie. Turkish UI verified — no English leak.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs reported. Single test failure during initial run was a test-author bug (asserted on email case before backend's lowercase normalization); fixed by asserting against email.lower().
